---
title: "JATS fixups test fixture"
abstract: |
  **Background:** State the problem.

  **Methods:** Describe the approach.

  **Findings:** Summarise results.

  **Conclusions:** State the contribution.

keywords:
  - one
  - two

author:
  - name:
      given: First
      family: Author
    orcid: 0000-0000-0000-0001
    affiliations:
      - ref: aff1
    corresponding: true
    email: first@example.org
    roles:
      - conceptualization
      - methodology
      - "writing - original draft"

affiliations:
  - id: aff1
    name: Test Institution
    city: City
    country: Country

bibliography: refs.bib
csl: https://www.zotero.org/styles/vancouver
---

# Background

This is body text with a citation [@example2024].

# Methods

A table:

| Variable | Definition |
|----------|------------|
| age | Years |
| sex | Factor |

# References

::: {#refs}
:::
